arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Rayo Vallecano, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid should have what it takes to beat Rayo in somewhat comfortable fashion, which would allow Ancelotti to make some substitutions during the second half to start preparing the game against Atlético. Real Madrid host Rayo Vallecano and Carlo Ancelotti seems ready to make some rotations, with players like Courtois and Rudiger getting some rest ahead of the crucial return leg against Atlético de Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid dealt Thibaut Courtois blow ahead of Champions League derby
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been handed a potentially significant blow just three days before their Champions League round-of-16 second leg away Atlético Madrid, with goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois missing Sunday’s LaLiga game against Rayo Vallecano through injury. Will Courtois play against Atlético Madrid in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Why Thibaut Courtois was dropped from Real Madrid squad to face Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois is Real Madrid's undisputed number one goalkeeper and is still regarded as one of the best in the business.

arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly set an asking price of £59m for Eduardo Camavinga, with Paris Saint-Germain and Manchester City both keen on him.
